articles.title: Barcelona thrash Lyon to win Champions League
articles.summary: Barcelona secure their fourth Champions League title in six seasons as Ewa Pajor and Salma Paralluelo each score twice to thrash Lyon in the final in Oslo.

articles.title: Fernandes named Premier League player of season
articles.summary: Midfielder Bruno Fernandes becomes the first Manchester United player to win the award since Nemanja Vidic in 2011.

articles.title: 'I trust them' - departing Guardiola on Man City's financial charges
articles.summary: Departing manager Pep Guardiola says he trusts how Manchester City behaved as the club continue to await rulings on 115 charges for allegedly breaching Premier League financial rules.
